headline: CSX Strengthens Industrial Network With New Select Site Additions
summary: CSX expands its Select Site program with 21 new properties, boosts supply-chain efficiency and positions itself for rising logistics demand.

headline: Diesel prices surge to $5 per gallon, highest since 2022, as Iran war disrupts global oil supplies
summary: Fuel prices are likely to keep rising until crude oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz return to normal.

headline: Winners And Losers Of Q4: CSX (NASDAQ:CSX) Vs The Rest Of The Transportation and Logistics Stocks
summary: As the Q4 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the transportation and logistics industry, including CSX (NASDAQ:CSX) and its peers.
